title: tragacantha murina
intro: Tragacantha murina, also known as the hairy ball or mouse hairy ball, is a type of plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to help with wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Tragacantha murina include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions due to its antimicrobial properties. Tragacantha murina is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
